short_snippet: escribing NICE guideline Reference number: NG84 Published: 26 January 2018 Download guidance (PDF) Overview This guideline sets out an antimicrobial prescribing strategy for acute sore throat. It aims to limit antibiotic use and reduce antimicrobial resistance. Acute sore throat is often caused by a virus, lasts for about a week, and most people get better without antibiotics.
